name: Generative AI Controls Framework Whitepaper
description: IBM whitepaper on a controls framework for Generative AI systems. Covers risk identification, control objectives, and implementation considerations for enterprise deployments of generative AI.
relationToCloudSecurity: Many enterprise GenAI deployments are cloud-hosted; the framework addresses both AI-layer and underlying cloud-layer concerns.
relationToAISecurity: Directly addresses GenAI security. Vendor perspective on controls; complements CSA AICM, NIST AI RMF, and ISO/IEC 42001.

license.notes: Vendor-published guidance document. Distribution terms per vendor's terms of use.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from source PDF via the marker pipeline.
